summary: Iteration 7 feature testing complete. Major update features verified: VenueSelectPage (calendar+events), Module dropdown (7 modules), Bar page (NFC+catalog+custom), Exit page (inside+exits), Rewards page (tiers+rewards+config). All 15 backend API tests passed. Fixed DB issue: tap_items.catalog_item_id NOT NULL constraint prevented custom items - altered to nullable.
seed_data_creation: Created test events, test guests for profile testing during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 complete. VenueSelectPage replaces old ModulesPage. After login redirects to /venue/home. PulseHeader has module dropdown (click 'Demo Club >'). Bar page has catalog with 12 items across categories. Rewards config stored in MongoDB with 4 tiers. tap_items.catalog_item_id is now nullable to support custom items.

tap_sessions: POST /api/tap/session/{id}/add-custom - adds custom item (fixed DB constraint) ✓
pulse_exits: GET /api/pulse/exits/today - returns exits with entry/exit times ✓
guest_profile: GET /api/pulse/guest/{id}/profile - returns full profile with history/consumptions/events ✓

venue_select_page: Create event form works (name input, cover price) ✓
Events display for selected date after creation ✓
module_dropdown: Dropdown shows: Venue Home, Pulse, TAP, Table, Kitchen, Manager, Owner, CEO ✓
pulse_tabs: Guest, Inside, Bar, Exit, Rewards tabs visible ✓
bar_page: Catalog shows items with categories (All, Beer, Cocktails, Food, Non-Alcohol, Spirits) ✓
Catalog items display: Heineken R$18, Brahma R$12, Gin&Tonic R$32, etc ✓
'+ Custom' button opens custom item form ✓
Custom form has name, price, category fields ✓
rewards_page: Points Configuration shows: 2 points per R$1 ✓
4 Tiers displayed: Bronze (0+), Silver (500+), Gold (2000+), Platinum (5000+) ✓
Tier perks shown: Basic member, Priority entry, VIP access+free drink, All perks+reserved table ✓
Available Rewards: Free Beer (100pts), VIP Upgrade (500pts) ✓
Edit mode: Save/Cancel buttons, Add Tier, Add Reward buttons visible ✓
Editable fields: tier name, min points, color, perks ✓

bugs_fixed.issue: catalog_item_id column had NOT NULL constraint, preventing custom items (which have no catalog_item_id)
bugs_fixed.fix: ALTER TABLE tap_items ALTER COLUMN catalog_item_id DROP NOT NULL

test_classes: TestVenueEvents (4 tests) - get events, filtered events, create event, event dates
TestRewardsConfig (4 tests) - get config, save config, update tiers, update rewards
TestTAPSessions (2 tests) - get active sessions, add custom item
TestPulseExits (2 tests) - today exits, inside guests
TestGuestProfile (2 tests) - get profile, not found
